systemLayers.name: Customer Hub
systemLayers.summary: Quote, account, booking, evidence, documents and support for customers and commercial clients.

systemLayers.name: Growth & Operations
systemLayers.summary: Lead, quote, contract, service, renewal and campaign intelligence in one operational center.

systemLayers.name: Media Engine
systemLayers.summary: Approved job media becomes scripts, clips, campaigns, publishing records and measurable learning.

channels.name: Instagram
channels.cadence: 15 adapted feed assets · 4-6 Reels · 10 Stories monthly

channels.name: YouTube
channels.cta: Service landing page or quote request

channels.name: LinkedIn
channels.cadence: 8 Carlos posts · 4 company posts · 2 native videos monthly

founder.name: Carlos Cuevas
founder.position: Founder authority for commercial cleaning, specialist technical cleaning and responsive property care
founder.rule: First-person operating insight, never generic motivational content or automated outreach.

scripts.title: From UTC in 1994 to UCM Today
scripts.hook: UCM began with technical cleaning before expanding into wider property care.

scripts.title: Experience That Must Be Proven
scripts.hook: Big claims mean nothing without evidence, process and permission.

scripts.title: What Happens After You Request a Quote?
scripts.hook: A proper quote begins with scope, access, frequency and standard.

scripts.title: What AI Does at UCM
scripts.hook: AI helps with planning and admin; trained people deliver the work.

scripts.title: The Office First-Impression Reset
scripts.hook: Your workplace starts speaking before the meeting does.

scripts.title: The Communal-Area Inspection
scripts.hook: Small cleaning failures become repeated tenant complaints.

scripts.title: End-of-Tenancy Detail Check
scripts.hook: Handover problems hide in the details.

scripts.title: Technical Spaces Need Technical Cleaning
scripts.hook: Server rooms and equipment cannot be treated like ordinary surfaces.

scripts.title: One Supplier, Fewer Headaches
scripts.hook: Cleaning plus maintenance reduces supplier friction.

scripts.title: Proof, Not Promises
scripts.hook: Show the real condition, process and result.

scripts.title: Carlos on Site
scripts.hook: Experience matters when it changes how a site is scoped and managed.

scripts.title: Sustainable Cleaning Without Slogans
scripts.hook: Products, process and evidence matter more than green imagery.

scripts.title: The Customer Case Study
scripts.hook: Problem, scope, delivery and outcome from an approved real client.

scripts.title: Cleaning in a London Growth Zone
scripts.hook: New buildings and busy neighbourhoods create specific cleaning pressure.

scripts.title: Five Questions Before Hiring a Cleaner
scripts.hook: Price is only one part of a reliable cleaning decision.

innovations.name: UCM CleanScope
innovations.value: Structured media-assisted enquiry with human-reviewed scope.
innovations.revenue: Higher conversion and lower admin cost
innovations.dependency: Quote rules, consent and human review
innovations.next: Pilot 20 enquiries beside the current process

innovations.name: UCM Proof Passport
innovations.value: Checklist, approved evidence, issues and sign-off.
innovations.next: Pilot two sites for four weeks

innovations.name: Essential Care Plan
innovations.value: Defined recurring cleaning and quality checks.

innovations.name: Intelligent Care Plan
innovations.next: Manual report with one design partner

innovations.name: Handover Complete
innovations.value: Cleaning, minor works, observations and completion evidence.

innovations.name: Google Review Engine
innovations.next: Send approved link after ten successful jobs

innovations.name: WhatsApp Quote Concierge
innovations.value: Structured message and media intake with human handoff.
innovations.revenue: Higher conversion and lower response cost

innovations.name: London Demand Radar
innovations.value: Public development signals joined to UCM outcomes.
innovations.dependency: Public data, CRM and contract outcomes

innovations.name: Founder Authority Programme
innovations.value: Experienced founder voice and relationship building.
innovations.next: Eight posts and two videos in 30 days

innovations.name: Consent-by-Design Media
innovations.value: Clear permission status before media use.

innovations.name: Building Health Report
innovations.value: Quality, defect, maintenance and action reporting.

pilots.name: Occupancy-Based Office Cleaning
pilots.gate: Client agreement, privacy review, baseline and no quality decline

pilots.name: Predictive Recommendations
pilots.gate: Sufficient structured data, useful accuracy and human approval

claims.claim: AI-assisted planning helps UCM structure enquiries and reduce avoidable administration.
claims.condition: Explain the human review and service-delivery role.

claims.claim: UCM saves customers a stated percentage through AI.
claims.condition: Requires verified baseline, method, sample and approval.

claims.claim: UCM is the cheapest cleaning company in London.
UCM traces its operating history to Universal Technical Cleaning, founded in 1994.
Name or display a prestigious historic client.
claims.condition: Requires evidence and permission for the exact use.

claims.claim: A service or process is environmentally preferable.
claims.condition: Specify the process and retain Green Claims Code evidence.

implementation.title: Define buyer offers and care plans
Repair the Media Engine for UCM
